innateAbility.name: Electromagnetic Repulsion
innateAbility.description: Damages and knocks all enemy units back within the radius, whenever the Stormcrafter accumulates a certain amount of damage taken.

abilities.name: Thunder Strike
abilities.description: Repeatedly strikes the unit with lightning.Exposes the affected enemy target, with each strike damaging nearby enemy units in a small radius, slowing both their movement and attack speeds for its duration.

abilities.name: Glimpse
abilities.description: Teleports the target hero back to where it was a few seconds ago.

abilities.name: Kinetic Field
abilities.description: After a short formation time, creates a circular barrier of kinetic energy that manipulates affected enemy's movement speed to point where they cannot pass.

abilities.name: Kinetic Fence
abilities.description: After a short formation time, creates a wall-barrier of kinetic energy that slows enemy units down to the point where they cannot pass through it.

abilities.name: Static Storm
abilities.description: Creates a damaging static storm that also silences all enemy units in the area for the duration.The damage starts off weak, but gradually increases in power over the duration.

talents.left: +6 Thunder Strike Strikesx0.5 Thunder Strike Strike Interval

talents.right: +1s Kinetic Field Duration+1s Kinetic Fence Duration
+15% Glimpse Distance to Damage+300 Glimpse Max Damage
